item.title: I Think Someone Is Living in the Storage Unit Next to Mine. What Should I Do?
item.description: I was so uncomfortable I just threw my things inside and left.

item.title: Do You Even Thinketh, Bro?
item.description: Lots of guys are recommending “As a Man Thinketh” for self-improvement. That’s not what it gave me.

item.title: Silicon Valley’s Answer to Declining Male Fertility? Sperm Racing.
item.description: A San Francisco biotech start-up races sex cells on tiny tracks. Can an internet joke become a serious business?

item.title: My Partner Fired a Gun in Our Home. Was I Wrong to Take It Away?
item.description: She said she felt an overwhelming compulsion to pull the trigger that she could not resist.

item.title: Can You Disappear Your Wife’s Ugly Clothing?
item.description: A ruling on a mother-in-law’s malign sartorial influence.

item.title: My Partner Won’t Tell Me Who Will Get ‘Our’ House If He Dies. Can I Press Him?
item.description: I need the security of knowing that I will not be forced to leave the home we have shared for so many years.

item.title: My Parents Suspect I’ve Lost My Faith. Should I Tell Them the Truth?
item.description: My mother sent me a long voicemail saying she believes I no longer pray, and implied that my wife may be to blame.

item.title: Can You Use Dirty Rubber Bands in the Kitchen?
item.description: A ruling on a cleanliness dispute.

item.title: Want to ‘Optimize’ Your Happiness? This Happiness Expert Says: Don’t.
item.description: Laurie Santos on what will really bring meaning and fulfillment to your life, and what won’t.

item.title: My Partner’s Dependence on Chatbots Is Becoming a Problem. How Do I Tell Him?
item.description: One reason I love my partner is his sharp mind and critical thinking. Using A.I. for every decision is something I don’t understand.

item.title: The Average Guys Outsmarting Wall Street on Prediction Markets
item.description: How prediction market ‘sharps’ have made millions wagering on everything from war to Rotten Tomatoes.

item.title: Spencer Pratt Wants to Be Mayor. His Fans Want Him to Be Batman.
item.description: What an A.I.-generated video of the former reality TV star teaches us about the future of political ads.

item.title: Not Every Language Has Spelling Bees. Here’s Why English Is Perfect for Them.
item.description: English’s hybrid history, silent letters and overcomplicated rules are what make the competition fierce.

item.title: What Happens After Deportation? A Family Leaves Their American Dream Behind.
item.description: After being removed from the United States, a family tries to rebuild their life back in Colombia.
